task_completion.description: Verifies the agent successfully logged into the SEB Server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or home page is visible in the web browser at localhost:8080.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the account profile or user settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile, account settings, or user editing page for the 'super-admin' account is displayed in the SEB Server interface.

task_completion.description: Verifies the First Name and Surname fields were updated to the target values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name input field contains exactly 'System' and the Surname (or Last Name) input field contains exactly 'Administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the Email field was updated to the target value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Email input field contains exactly 'admin@university-testing.edu'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the Language and Timezone fields were updated to the target values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Language dropdown or input field shows 'English' (or 'en') and the Timezone dropdown or input field shows 'America/New_York'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the password was updated and the profile changes were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The password input fields contain masked characters (dots/asterisks) indicating a new password was entered, and/or there is a visible success notification (e.g., 'Saved successfully', 'Profile updated') on the screen.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the SEB Server through a web browser window, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or API scripts) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine SEB Server web interface with its standard layout and styling, not a generic text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not simply type the expected values into a text file to satisfy OCR checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target values (System, Administrator, email, etc.) are entered directly into the correct form fields within the SEB Server web application, not in a notepad, terminal, or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected profile values to verify in the SEB Server GUI: First Name = 'System', Surname = 'Administrator', Email = 'admin@university-testing.edu', Timezone = 'America/New_York', Language = 'English' (or 'en'). The new password is 'SEB_Secure#2024' (verify via masked password fields or a save success message).
